title: GATE CRASHERS Act
stage_label: Read twice and referred to the Committee on the Judiciary.
crs_summary: Guarding and Administering Trespass Enforcement, Controlling Restricted Areas, and Stopping High-risk Encroachment Recidivism and Sabotage Act or the GATE CRASHERS Act This bill establishes a new federal criminal offense for going onto Department of Defense property that is closed or restricted without authorization.
last_action_text: Read twice and referred to the Committee on the Judiciary.
